backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor that mixes in blob storage and authorization, manages user profiles, and stores/serves site content including services, clinics, social links, hero settings, and about section data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: full mobile responsiveness across all public-facing pages, and renaming the admin login button label from 'Admin' to 'Login'.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short summaries describing each component's or page's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app, setting dark mode class, viewport meta, Space Grotesk and Inter Google Fonts, and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with a public layout route (Header + main) and a standalone admin route, wrapped in QueryClientProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/AboutEdito: Admin editor component for the About section that allows updating biography text and profile image (via file upload or URL) using mutations against the backend actor, with preview and delete support.
frontend/src/components/admin/ClinicsMan: Admin component for managing clinic listings, supporting add, edit, and delete operations via backend actor mutations, with an inline form for clinic details like name, address, phone, and URLs.
frontend/src/components/admin/FooterEdit: Simple admin editor for updating the site footer text content, with a textarea input and save button backed by a mutation to the backend actor.
frontend/src/components/admin/HeaderEdit: Admin editor for the site header that allows updating the site title and uploading/deleting a header logo image (base64), with mutations to persist changes via the backend actor.
frontend/src/components/admin/HeroSettin: Admin editor for configuring hero section visual settings including particle effects, gradients, and glow effects for both hero and footer, loaded from and saved to the backend via custom query hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/ImagesMana: Admin component for managing site images, specifically the hero background image, supporting upload by base64, URL update, and deletion via React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/ImageUploa: Reusable admin UI component for image management that supports file upload (base64, max 1.5MB), URL input, preview, and deletion with loading states and error feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/ServicesMa: Admin CRUD component for managing services, including add, edit, delete, and icon upload/delete operations, using React Query mutations and an alert dialog for confirmations.
frontend/src/components/admin/SocialLink: Admin CRUD component for managing social media links (platform + URL), with inline add/edit forms, delete confirmation dialogs, and platform name suggestions.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin dashboard with a sidebar nav and section switcher rendering editors for header, hero, about, services, clinics, social links, footer, and images, plus a logout handler.
frontend/src/components/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login form with glassmorphism styling, username/password inputs with eye-toggle, inline error display, loading state, and a back-to-homepage link.
frontend/src/components/ClinicCard.tsx: Renders a styled card for a clinic with name, description, address, phone, and action buttons for booking and map links.
frontend/src/components/EditableField.ts: Provides inline-editable text and image field components that show edit controls only when an admin session token is present.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with an animated particle canvas, optional configurable glow orbs, and dynamic footer content fetched via a query hook.
frontend/src/components/GlassCard.tsx: A simple wrapper component that applies a glassmorphism card style with optional hover lift effect.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with scroll-aware background, desktop nav links, and a collapsible mobile dropdown menu.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps page content with the Header and a padded main area using TanStack Router's Outlet.
frontend/src/components/ParticleCanvas.t: Canvas-based animated particle system supporting configurable count, speed, color, connection lines, and mouse repulsion interaction.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralized collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including content, hero settings, site title, about section, images, services, social links, and clinics.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining OKLCH design tokens for light/dark modes, Tailwind base imports, typography, glassmorphism card styles, gradient text utilities, and hero background styles.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Displays the doctor's biography section, fetching about text and profile image (base64 or URL) from the backend actor.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Manages admin authentication state, showing either the AdminLogin or AdminDashboard component based on session token presence.
frontend/src/pages/Clinics.tsx: Renders a grid of clinic location cards fetched from backend content, with loading skeletons and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Hero section with a particle canvas background, fetching site title, hero image, and particle/glow settings from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/MainPage.tsx: Composes the full public-facing page by rendering Home, About, Services, Clinics, SocialMedia, and Footer sections in order.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Displays a responsive grid of medical services with icons fetched from backend content, including loading skeletons and empty state.
frontend/src/pages/SocialMedia.tsx: Renders a row of social media link buttons with platform-specific icons, sourced from backend content.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom colors (using OKLCH), fonts, font sizes, border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations for the frontend design system.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking two pending features: making the public-facing site fully mobile-responsive and changing the admin login button label from 'Admin' to 'Login'.
